## Example

```esql
ROW u = "https://example.com/?x=foo bar&y=baz"
| EVAL u = URL_ENCODE_COMPONENT(u)
```

| u:keyword |
| --- |
| https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2F%3Fx%3Dfoo%20bar%26y%3Dbaz |
